review: Acceptance: Coordinator lane documentation exists and covers routing, status hygiene, dispatch guardrails, notification discipline, and escalation.

Note: Spark dispatch was quota-blocked, so the Coordinator lane deliverable was completed locally from the Mac operator session.
Note: Future automated coordinator workers should use this contract and avoid unbounded dispatch retries.

Residual risk must be stated explicitly, even when the risk is none.
